name: 11q24_OPCML_SD
description: 11q24-q25 distal subtelomeric segmental duplication block flanking OPCML (opioid-binding protein/cell adhesion molecule like) and the Jacobsen-syndrome 11q terminal deletion region. Contains subtelomeric SDs shared with other chromosome ends and DUX4-like macrosatellite remnants.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD modules of 5-30 kb at 90-97% identity; FRA11B fragile site (CCG triplet expansion at CBL2) drives Jacobsen deletion breakpoints.
